# Activating Your Black Friday & Cyber Monday Data

Webinar

# Activating Your Black Friday & Cyber Monday Data

October 9, 2025

60 minutes

On demand

## Description

Black Friday Cyber Monday (BFCM) is a whirlwind of activity, and one of the most defining moments of success for the year. You’ve invested heavily in acquiring new customers, often at an astronomical cost, and seen a surge in sales. But as the holiday glow fades, a critical question emerges: **how do you keep those deal-sensitive customers engaged and loyal throughout the new year and beyond?**

Join **Iterable**, **Segment**, and **Talon.One** for an exclusive webinar designed to help you unlock the true **potential of your BFCM data**. We’ll show you how to transform fleeting holiday purchases into **lasting customer relationships** and drive sustainable growth.
